from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a fluent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a lambda that builds a phrase.
    # The lambda receives (subject, object) and returns a string.
    templates = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} meters tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o}",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{s} is coached by {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was pick number {o.strip('\"')}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} debuted with {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"The home ground of {s} is {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"The stadium of {s} is {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"The general manager of {s} is {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {s} is {o}",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"{s} participated in the {o} season",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{o} is spoken in {s}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes the ethnic group {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the anthem of {s}",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f"The team with the most championships in {s} is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"The UTC offset for {s} is {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"The time zone of {s} is {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"The total area of {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
    }

    # Build a lookup of attributes for each subject
    subj_attrs = {}
    for t in triples:
        subj_attrs.setdefault(t.subject, {})[t.predicate] = t.object

    # Build sentences per subject, aggregating its attributes.
    subject_sentences = []
    for subject, attrs in subj_attrs.items():
        parts = []

        # Birth information
        if "birthDate" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was born on {attrs['birthDate']}")
        elif "birthYear" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was born in {attrs['birthYear']}")
        if "birthPlace" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"in {attrs['birthPlace']}")

        # Physical attributes
        if "height" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"is {attrs['height']} meters tall")
        if "weight" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"weighs {attrs['weight']}")

        # Position
        if "position" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"plays as a {attrs['position']}")

        # Youth club
        if "youthclub" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"whose youth club was {attrs['youthclub']}")

        # Current clubs (club / currentclub) – may be multiple
        clubs = []
        for key in ("club", "currentclub"):
            if key in attrs:
                clubs.append(attrs[key])
        if clubs:
            if len(clubs) == 1:
                parts.append(f"plays for {clubs[0]}")
            else:
                club_list = " and ".join(clubs)
                parts.append(f"plays for {club_list}")

        # Former team
        if "formerTeam" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"formerly played for {attrs['formerTeam']}")

        # Draft information
        if "draftTeam" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was drafted by {attrs['draftTeam']}")
        if "draftYear" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was drafted in {attrs['draftYear']}")
        if "draftRound" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was selected in round {attrs['draftRound']}")
        if "draftPick" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"was pick number {attrs['draftPick'].strip('\"')}")

        # Current team (different predicate)
        if "currentteam" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"currently plays for {attrs['currentteam']}")

        # Debut team
        if "debutTeam" in attrs:
            parts.append(f"debuted with {attrs['debutTeam']}")

        # Managerial / leadership relations (invert phrasing)
        invert_map = {
            "manager": "manager",
            "coach": "coach",
            "owner": "owner",
            "generalManager": "general manager",
            "chairman": "chairman",
            "leader": "leader",
        }
        for pred, role in invert_map.items():
            if pred in attrs:
                parts.append(f"{attrs[pred]} is the {role} of {subject}")

        # Remaining generic attributes
        for pred, obj in attrs.items():
            if pred in {
                "birthDate","birthYear","birthPlace","height","weight","position",
                "youthclub","club","currentclub","formerTeam","draftTeam","draftYear",
                "draftRound","draftPick","currentteam","debutTeam"
            }:
                continue
            if pred in invert_map:
                continue
            # Use template if available
            if pred in templates:
                generic_phrase = templates[pred](subject, obj)
                parts.append(generic_phrase)
            else:
                parts.append(f"The {pred} of {subject} is {obj}")

        # Assemble subject sentence
        if parts:
            subject_sentence = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(parts) + "."
        else:
            subject_sentence = f"{subject}."
        subject_sentences.append(subject_sentence)

    # Combine all subject sentences into one paragraph-like output.
    if not subject_sentences:
        return ""
    if len(subject_sentences) == 1:
        return subject_sentences[0]
    # Join with spaces; ensure proper punctuation.
    return " ".join(subject_sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
